body.class: bg-surface text-on-surface antialiased min-h-screen pb-24 md:pb-0

header.class: fixed top-0 left-0 w-full z-50 flex justify-between items-center px-margin-mobile h-16 bg-surface shadow-sm dark:shadow-none transition-colors

div.class: w-10 h-10 rounded-full overflow-hidden bg-surface-container-high border border-outline-variant

img.data-alt: A professional headshot of a smiling woman with dark hair, lit by soft natural light against a neutral grey background. The image is crisp, modern, and conveys a sense of approachable health and vitality.

button.class: w-10 h-10 flex items-center justify-center rounded-full text-primary dark:text-primary-fixed-dim hover:bg-surface-variant dark:hover:bg-surface-container-highest transition-colors active:scale-95 duration-150 ease-in-out

aside.class: hidden md:flex flex-col w-64 fixed left-0 top-16 bottom-0 bg-surface-container-low border-r border-outline-variant/20 p-md z-40

a.class: flex items-center gap-sm px-4 py-3 rounded-lg text-on-surface-variant hover:bg-surface-variant transition-all group
flex items-center gap-sm px-4 py-3 rounded-lg text-on-surface-variant hover:bg-surface-variant transition-all group
flex items-center gap-sm px-4 py-3 rounded-lg text-on-surface-variant hover:bg-surface-variant transition-all group
flex items-center gap-sm px-4 py-3 rounded-lg bg-primary-container text-on-primary-container font-medium shadow-sm transition-all

main.class: pt-24 px-margin-mobile md:pl-[calc(256px+24px)] md:pr-margin-desktop max-w-7xl mx-auto space-y-md

header.p: Gestionează preferințele și securitatea contului tău Vitality.

section.class: bg-surface-container-lowest rounded-xl p-md shadow-[0_4px_20px_0_rgba(0,0,0,0.04)] border border-[#E0E0E0] hover:shadow-[0_8px_24px_0_rgba(0,0,0,0.08)] transition-shadow

div.class: flex items-center gap-sm mb-md pb-sm border-b border-surface-variant
w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-primary-container/20 flex items-center justify-center text-primary

a.class: flex items-center justify-between p-sm hover:bg-surface-container-low rounded-lg transition-colors group
flex items-center justify-between p-sm hover:bg-surface-container-low rounded-lg transition-colors group
flex items-center justify-between p-sm hover:bg-surface-container-low rounded-lg transition-colors group

section.class: bg-surface-container-lowest rounded-xl p-md shadow-[0_4px_20px_0_rgba(0,0,0,0.04)] border border-[#E0E0E0] hover:shadow-[0_8px_24px_0_rgba(0,0,0,0.08)] transition-shadow

div.class: flex items-center gap-sm mb-md pb-sm border-b border-surface-variant
w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-primary-container/20 flex items-center justify-center text-primary

a.class: flex items-center justify-between p-sm hover:bg-surface-container-low rounded-lg transition-colors group

div.class: flex items-center justify-between p-sm rounded-lg hover:bg-surface-container-low transition-colors

button.class: w-12 h-6 rounded-full bg-primary-container flex items-center px-1 transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary focus:ring-offset-2

div.class: w-4 h-4 rounded-full bg-on-primary transform translate-x-6 transition-transform shadow-sm

section.class: bg-surface-container-lowest rounded-xl p-md shadow-[0_4px_20px_0_rgba(0,0,0,0.04)] border border-[#E0E0E0] hover:shadow-[0_8px_24px_0_rgba(0,0,0,0.08)] transition-shadow

div.class: flex items-center gap-sm mb-md pb-sm border-b border-surface-variant
w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-primary-container/20 flex items-center justify-center text-primary
flex items-center justify-between p-sm rounded-lg hover:bg-surface-container-low transition-colors group

a.class: flex items-center justify-between p-sm rounded-lg hover:bg-surface-container-low transition-colors group

div.class: flex items-center justify-between p-sm rounded-lg hover:bg-surface-container-low transition-colors group

button.class: w-12 h-6 rounded-full bg-surface-variant border border-outline-variant flex items-center px-1 transition-colors focus:outline-none

div.class: w-4 h-4 rounded-full bg-on-surface-variant transform translate-x-0 transition-transform shadow-sm

section.class: bg-surface-container-lowest rounded-xl p-md shadow-[0_4px_20px_0_rgba(0,0,0,0.04)] border border-[#E0E0E0] hover:shadow-[0_8px_24px_0_rgba(0,0,0,0.08)] transition-shadow

div.class: flex items-center gap-sm mb-md pb-sm border-b border-surface-variant
w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-primary-container/20 flex items-center justify-center text-primary

a.class: flex items-center justify-between p-sm hover:bg-surface-container-low rounded-lg transition-colors group

section.class: bg-surface-container-lowest rounded-xl p-md shadow-[0_4px_20px_0_rgba(0,0,0,0.04)] border border-[#E0E0E0] hover:shadow-[0_8px_24px_0_rgba(0,0,0,0.08)] transition-shadow

a.class: flex items-center gap-sm p-sm hover:bg-surface-container-low rounded-lg transition-colors text-on-surface group
flex items-center gap-sm p-sm hover:bg-surface-container-low rounded-lg transition-colors text-on-surface group

button.class: w-full flex items-center justify-center gap-sm p-md rounded-xl border border-error text-error hover:bg-error-container hover:text-on-error-container transition-colors font-label-md text-label-md h-12 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-error focus:ring-offset-2

nav.class: md:hidden fixed bottom-0 left-0 w-full z-50 flex justify-around items-center px-4 py-2 bg-surface shadow-[0_-4px_20px_0_rgba(0,0,0,0.04)] rounded-t-xl border-t border-surface-variant

a.class: flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant hover:bg-surface-variant transition-all active:scale-90 duration-200 w-16 h-14 rounded-lg
flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant hover:bg-surface-variant transition-all active:scale-90 duration-200 w-16 h-14 rounded-lg
flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-on-surface-variant hover:bg-surface-variant transition-all active:scale-90 duration-200 w-16 h-14 rounded-lg
flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-primary-container text-on-primary-container rounded-full px-4 py-1 active:scale-90 duration-200 h-14
